blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Could not validate the required LLM reasoning stage in full eBPF->LLM->notify pipeline because LM Studio was unreachable on localhost:1234.
Cannot measure event->LLM->notify latency without an available LM Studio runtime; localhost:1234 was unreachable.

appliedUpdates.description: Added notify-core setup notes and flow validator isolation guidance sections for host-unit-tests and terminal-vm-e2e.
Corrected Agentfield healthcheck endpoint to /api/v1/nodes and daemon service unit from veronicad to veronica.
